form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 295m at this track in a handy (17.40), beating Mitcham Crichton. Must be a winning chance again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 295m at this track. Looks tested in this company.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance showing plenty of speed to score by a nose in a Class 2 last start at this track, recording a good 17.22 over the 295m journey. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Class 3 on March 19 over 295m at this track behind Tabetha Jewel beaten 7 lengths (17.58). Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to post a big 4.5 lengths victory in a Class 2 last start at this track, clocking a brilliant 17.10 for the 295m trip. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing fifth (18.10) at this track before going for a four-and-a-half months spell. Placed at both tries fresh. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Looks close to another win after his success on February 12 at this track over 525m. Last start was fourth over 295m in 17.06, behind Raphael Jewel. Should be around the mark.
